Look i love this game and i had a lot of fun with it, while it lasted. This is cos some genius thought it was a good idea to litterally make it so that you cant play it; the problem is is that you cant just delete a demo like that. Demos should stay up until the game releases, minimum. I cant wait for the full game but seriously what are you doing? I had so much fun but you cant just do that. I mean most game demos last till after the game is released. There is one thing I'll dis agree with most people on, that is cos i love cats and the contrast between a happy cat and a violent serial killer i find funny because the cat is a violent serial killer. And i like the isane gore cos it is so over the top (considering at the end if the day, you are a cat) that it is funny.
There was some issues but not insanely bad, I’m happy I got to test it, I’m really looking forward to the full release of Catanana in the future!

reviews.review_title: This game is a absolute piece of garbage
reviews.review_description: It’s like someone made a dumpster fire, then tried to hide it as an oven. This game looks really nice for an app lab game on the front of it, but really, you can’t even get past the untested,untextured,and buggy scripted maps they have. It’s a disgrace to even the worst app lab games. Whoever made this, you failed.

reviews.review_title: A good game wasted because of one thing
reviews.review_description: It feels good and it is a good game until you need to wall run it just sometimes stops working and this is very frustrating and makes a level not 40 seconds long it makes it 1 hour long.Also why are you one hit this so dumb because sometimes it bugs and you just get hit.I am gonna play it again when Wall running is fixed

I fully recommend the game, the fighting and stuff is awesome. And the gadgets are neat to. The thing is if you die in a level, no matter how far you are in it, you restart the entire thing. Go back ALLL the way to the start. Also, I find it abnormal how if you miss trying to hit an enemy and they try to punch you,  you can’t hurt them no matter what. Also, you die if you get hit from an enemy ONCE. only ONCE. if you get punched ONE TIME BY A ENEMY you die. Please make it 2-3, because I find this unrealistic. Other than all these problems listed before, the game is great. I recommend it.

DO NOT BUY GAME

reviews.review_title: Would be fun if the tutorial wasn't long
reviews.review_description: They seriously made like 10 levels just for the tutorial, and most of them aren't even necessary. Ive spent 4 hours trying to heat hook 3 but since the wallrun and hook mechanics don't work together well, I can only get to the part where you have to jump from a wallrun into another wallrun. Not only is just getting into one wallrun clunky and awkward, but 2? From another one? No thanks. Maybe if they just kept with the 2 basic tutorial levels, I could find this game fun.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thankd for playing Red Flower, we really appreciate it! Please, pay attention to the fact, that it is only beta version of the game, and there are a lot of things to do till the full version. The teams is doing its best, and we hope that you will love the game after its global release.

reviews.review_description:
This game is still in beta, so there is still a lot I'll need to see but what I've seen so far is pretty much just a copy of Neon White, but built for VR.

Don't get me wrong, Neon White is one of my favorite games and VR is my favorite gaming medium, but it just feels disingenuous to blatantly copy this much of Neon White without at least mentioning it as inspiration in the game's description.

Let me explain: Neon White is a platforming speed-running FPS game. Each level has little secret shortcuts to help you achieve faster times. Those shortcuts are revealed by playing through the level a few times in order to reach the Insight level needed to grant you the shortcut hint. Sound familiar?

What made Neon White different from other platforming FPS games was the Insight Level that Ben Esposito designed, in combination with each level's shortcuts, which made it a game built for speed-running.

So far, the only unique parts in this game compared to Neon White is the fact that there are sometimes more enemies than needed to pass the level, allowing you to strategically choose which enemies to skip to achieve a faster time. Everything else, including the katana and its dash, is pretty much a reskinned copy. In Neon White, the main character's primary weapon is a katana, the dash is a nerfed version of Neon White's Book of Life discard, the hook is also a nerfed version of NW's Dominion discard, etc.

But this game is still in Beta, there could be much more to look forward to that isn't a straight up copy of Neon White. But until then, that's what this game is right now, with less mechanics, less creativity, and clunky movement that makes it feel less robust than Neon White.

developer_response.body: Hey! The graphics will be improved in the future. Now the game available only in beta and the game is not finished yet.

reviews.review_description: Over all the game is incredible and for what it has to offer at the stage it's already in is amazing I am a veteran when it comes to vr games and I've played some games with the highest discomfort rating you can get on a game this one in the state that it's at now granted I know it is a beta you will get some pretty big motion sickness because to me it looks like some objects in the game don't move at the same speed as others so it has this kinda jittery kind of look but other than that it's phenomenal for what it has to offer and I can't wait to see how much it expands

The feeling of a fast gory killing game with 5 star movement just makes me feel like I’m the king of the world. The movement to this game has a stride kind of feeling and to be honest this game is better then stride so if you are new to the oculus (our not and just trying to look for something new) this game is perfect 

But if you have motion sickness then try something else first to get used to it.

developer_response.body: Hey! We're sorry to hear that you had trouble navigating the maps and found the gameplay and graphics to be terrible. We appreciate your feedback and will take it into consideration as we continue to improve the game. If you have any specific suggestions on how we can make the game better, please let us know at https://support.joyway.games/ .
